scripts.dev: concurrently "vite build --watch" "vite build --watch --config vite.content.config.ts" "vite build --watch --config vite.background.config.ts"
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox && npm run zip
scripts.build:chrome: rimraf dist && cross-env TARGET=chrome vite build && cross-env TARGET=chrome vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && cross-env TARGET=chrome vite build --config vite.background.config.ts && copyfiles -u 1 "public/**/*" dist && cross-env TARGET=chrome node scripts/build-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:firefox: rimraf dist-firefox && cross-env TARGET=firefox vite build && cross-env TARGET=firefox vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && cross-env TARGET=firefox vite build --config vite.background.config.ts && copyfiles -u 1 "public/**/*" dist-firefox && cross-env TARGET=firefox node scripts/build-manifest.mjs
scripts.zip: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); try { if(fs.existsSync('linguaflow-chrome.zip')) fs.unlinkSync('linguaflow-chrome.zip'); if(fs.existsSync('linguaflow-firefox.zip')) fs.unlinkSync('linguaflow-firefox.zip'); execSync('powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist\\* -DestinationPath linguaflow-chrome.zip -Force'); execSync('powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist-firefox\\* -DestinationPath linguaflow-firefox.zip -Force'); console.log('Successfully generated linguaflow-chrome.zip and linguaflow-firefox.zip'); } catch(e) { console.error(e.message); }"
